abstract: Returns a response indicating whether the person shared their age range.

declaration.code: func callAsFunction(ageGates threshold1: Int, _ threshold2: Int? = nil, _ threshold3: Int? = nil) async throws -> AgeRangeService.Response

overview:
## Return Value

A response indicating whether the person declared their age range. If the person shared their age range, the system also returns the age range.

## Discussion

Regional requirements may override your age gates based on the person’s location.

Use [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/SwiftUI/EnvironmentValues/requestAgeRange] with SwiftUI environment values to request age ranges in response to user interactions:
title: callAsFunction(ageGates:_:_:)
